name: API Gateway - Booking REST Endpoint
description:
As a client application
  I want to submit booking requests through the REST API
  So that bookings are processed by the system

steps.name: the API gateway is running on port "8080"
the audit service is running on port "8084"

elements.name: Booking creation produces a CREATED audit event

steps.name: I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:
the HTTP response status should be "202"
the response body should contain field "bookingId"
I query the audit trail for the last booking
the audit trail should contain an event with action "CREATED"
the audit event should have source "api-gateway"
the audit event payload should contain "CR-AUDIT-101"
the API gateway is running on port "8080"
the audit service is running on port "8084"

elements.name: Audit trail returns events in chronological order

steps.name: I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:
the HTTP response status should be "202"
I query the audit trail for the last booking
the audit trail should have at least 1 event
the first audit event should have action "CREATED"
the API gateway is running on port "8080"
the audit service is running on port "8084"

elements.name: Audit endpoint returns 404 for unknown booking ID

steps.name: I query the audit trail for booking "BK-NONEXISTENT"
the audit HTTP response status should be "404"
the API gateway is running on port "8080"
the audit service is running on port "8084"

elements.name: Audit events can be queried by classroom ID

steps.name: I send a POST request to "/bookings" with body:
the HTTP response status should be "202"
I query audit events for classroom "CR-AUDIT-200"
the classroom audit trail should not be empty

  So that I can conduct my sessions without scheduling conflicts

name: Booking Notification
description:
As a user
  I want to receive a notification after my booking attempt
  So that I know whether my classroom was successfully reserved or rejected
